title.en: Invocation (upon receipt of the loan) for someone who lends you money

items.arabicText: ((بارَكَ اللَّهُ لَكَ فِي أَهْلِكَ وَمَالِكَ، إِنَّمَا جَزَاءُ السَّلَفِ الْحَمْدُ وَالأَدَاءُ)).

translations.en: (May Allah bless for you, your family and wealth. Surely commendation and payment are the reward for a loan.)
